actions.detail: client facing | client interaction | ai driven information

policies.name: acts_in_client_best_interest
policies.description: Every AI-supported recommendation is assessed against the overarching MiFID II obligation to act in the client's best interest.

policies.name: ai_complaints_recorded
policies.description: Firms maintain comprehensive records on AI-related client and potential-client complaints.

policies.name: ai_information_clear_fair
policies.description: Information provided to clients on the firm's use of AI is presented in a clear, fair and not misleading manner.

policies.name: ai_information_monitored
policies.description: Ex-post controls monitor and evaluate any process that delivers information to clients directly or indirectly through AI-driven mechanisms.

policies.name: ai_output_accuracy_controlled
policies.description: Ex-ante controls verify the accuracy of information supplied to or by AI before it is disseminated to clients, preventing erroneous or misleading investment advice.

policies.name: ai_records_maintained
policies.description: Records document the use of AI, including the decision-making processes, data sources used, algorithms implemented, and any modifications made over time.

policies.name: ai_stress_tested
policies.description: AI systems are periodically stress-tested to evaluate performance under extreme market conditions.

policies.name: ai_tested_before_deployment
policies.description: AI systems are tested and validated before deployment in the provision of investment services.

policies.name: ai_use_disclosed_to_client
policies.description: Firms transparently disclose to clients when they are interacting with an AI system (e.g. chatbots or other AI-driven automated systems).

policies.name: outsourced_ai_due_diligence
policies.description: Third-party AI used for critical or important operational functions is subject to MiFID II outsourcing due diligence and adequate controls.

policies.name: product_governance_aligned
policies.description: AI-driven distribution aligns the products distributed to their identified target market (product governance).

policies.name: recommendation_suitable
policies.description: AI-supported recommendations are subject to a suitability assessment aligning them to the client's situation, objectives, sustainability preferences, risk tolerance, and knowledge.

policies.name: staff_competent_for_ai
policies.description: Staff using AI to provide information about investment products to clients do so under heightened vigilance and with adequate AI competence and training.

policies.name: training_data_representative
policies.description: Data used as input for AI systems is relevant, sufficient and representative, and algorithms are trained and validated on accurate, comprehensive and sufficiently broad datasets.
